title: Very Nice Shoes
caption: Harriet was delighted to be interviewed. She gave a 40-minute history of the garden dating back to 1952. Rosie learned about the Great Compost Dispute of 1978. Eventually, they got to the matter at hand. Harriet had seen the green coat man. She had not seen his face. But she had noticed his shoes.
story_notes: Rosie interviews Harriet, who gives a 40-minute garden history before finally revealing she saw the green coat man on Tuesday morning — looking carefully at the garden, with very nice shoes.
